timeComplexity: O(L), where L is the length of the linked list
explanation: The solution first calculates the length of the linked list. Then, it determines the position of the node to remove by traversing the list again, stopping just before the target node and adjusting the pointers accordingly.
improvements: The solution could be improved by using a single pass approach with two pointers to find the nth node from the end without needing to calculate the length first.
